titleStmt.title: SII 22.415: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 415. (A.R. No. 415 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, ŚIVALAPPĒRI. AḺAGAR TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL RĀJ. [VĪRARĀJĒNDRADĒVA]—Date lost.

summary.p: This is a fragment containing a portion of the introduction of Vīrarājēndra-Chōḷa beginning with the expression Viramē tuṇaiyāgavum, and of the inscription proper, recording a gift of 50 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Ten-Tirumāliruñjōlai-Dēvar in Kīḻkaḷakkūṟṟam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—lak karuṅkali kaṭintu kūṭal caṅkattākavamallaṉai Añcuvittu—vikkalaṉai yum caṅkalaṉaiyum muṟai
—jayābhiṣekampaṇṇi viraciṅkātaṉattu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiṉa kovirājakecari
—koṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭuk kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu ten=tirumāliruñcolai devaṟku tirumalli nāṭa
—mpi Āyiravan=tiruppūvaṇam ten=tirumāliruñcolai devaṟku vaitta tarāttirunun=ta
—ṭu Aimpatu Ivvāṭu Aimpatuṅ kaikkoṇṭu can=tirātittavaṟ nittam Aṭṭakkaṭavane
—ṉ niṟai Āḻākku ney Aṭṭakkaṭavāṉ caṭaiyaṉ cittaṉ Ivvuḻakku ney
Digital edition of SII 22.415 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
